title: Semiconductor Materials — Electronic Grade Chemicals
entry_mechanism: SABIC downstream speciality chemicals investment producing semiconductor-grade materials from domestic petrochemical base
executive_summary:
Semiconductor manufacturing requires ultra-pure chemicals — electronic grade solvents, etchants, photoresists, and dopant gases at purities exceeding 99.9999% (6N purity). Saudi Arabia's SABIC produces many of the base chemicals that electronic grade semiconductor materials are refined from — a classic value chain gap: exporting commodity chemicals while importing ultra-pure electronic-grade versions.

Node SC-2 targets Saudi production of electronic grade semiconductor chemicals: ultra-pure hydrofluoric acid (HF), sulphuric acid, isopropyl alcohol (IPA), hydrogen peroxide, and specialty gases (silane, germane, phosphine) used in semiconductor wafer cleaning, etching, and deposition. The refining processes for electronic grade purity are technically demanding but well-established, and SABIC's chemical engineering infrastructure provides the foundation.

The global electronic chemicals market was valued at $22 billion in 2024 growing at 7.8% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's addressable opportunity — supplying electronic grade chemicals to Asian and European fabs — is potentially $500M–1B annually at steady state, with immediate domestic demand from SSIH's Phase II fabrication ambitions.

companies.name: Stella Chemifa
companies.rationale: Stella Chemifa produces electronic grade HF and is the global quality standard. Technology licensing for Saudi production.

companies.name: Air Liquide (Electronics)
companies.rationale: Air Liquide produces electronic specialty gases for semiconductor fabs. Non-US technology with active Gulf industrial presence.

companies.name: Mitsubishi Chemical / Semiconductor Materials
companies.rationale: Mitsubishi Chemical produces semiconductor process chemicals and has international licensing partnerships.

companies.name: Merck KGaA Electronics
companies.rationale: Merck produces photoresists and specialty chemicals for semiconductor manufacturing. Active SSIH engagement interest.
companies.contact: Merck KGaA VP Semiconductor Solutions, International

companies.name: Honeywell Electronic Materials
companies.rationale: Honeywell produces specialty semiconductor gases and has process technology licensing.

partners.upgrade: SABIC electronic grade chemical refining investment; Air Liquide or Stella Chemifa technology JV; ultra-pure HF and IPA production; 6N purity certification; SSIH as domestic anchor customer
partners.timeline: 36 months to first electronic grade chemical production
